patterns_discovered.name: Provider Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Implements LLMProvider interface with AsyncOpenAI client wrapper
patterns_discovered.implementation: ChutesProvider extends LLMProvider with async generate method

patterns_discovered.name: Graceful Degradation / Fallback Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Attempts json_schema format first, falls back to json_object with schema in system prompt
patterns_discovered.benefit: Increases compatibility with APIs that support different response format versions

patterns_discovered.name: Configuration Pattern
patterns_discovered.flexibility: Allows runtime override while providing sensible defaults

gotchas_discovered.risk: Masks unexpected errors and makes debugging difficult

gotchas_discovered.location: Line 51-53: schema appended to system prompt
gotchas_discovered.risk: Large schemas could exceed token limits silently
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Add warning or validation for schema size before appending

gotchas_discovered.issue: Fallback may not preserve response validity
gotchas_discovered.risk: json_object fallback relies on model compliance; no post-processing validation
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Add JSON validation and parsing after fallback mode response

gotchas_discovered.issue: Missing error handling for response content
gotchas_discovered.risk: Could fail if content is None
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Add null check or error handling for missing content

recommendations.action: Replace generic Exception with specific OpenAI exceptions (APIError, APIResponseValidationError, etc.)
Add JSON response validation in fallback path to ensure valid JSON before returning
Add logging for fallback mechanism activation to track API compatibility issues
Add schema size validation before appending to system prompt to prevent token limit issues
Add null checks for response.choices[0].message.content before returning
Add unit tests for both json_schema and json_object fallback paths
